title: signed'() appears not to be supported
body:
I assume this implies that other 'xxx() operators don't work (e.g. unsigned', string',  either 22'(xxx)

The $'s versions do work. I think they behave the same so maybe an easy fix?

hhgw11(trs) iverilog -o shift_operators3 -g2012 shift_operators3_.sv
shift_operators3_.sv:39: syntax error
shift_operators3_.sv:39: error: malformed statement
shift_operators3_.sv:40: syntax error
shift_operators3_.sv:40: error: malformed statement


module shift_operators3_
(
 input    logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              data                                    ,
 input    logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       data2                                   ,
 input    logic [ 1 : 0 ]                                              amount                                  ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q1                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q2                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q5                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q6                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q7                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q8                                      ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q13                                     ,
 output   logic [ 3 : 0 ]                                              q14                                     ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q3                                      ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q4                                      ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q9                                      ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q10                                     ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q11                                     ,
 output   logic signed [ 3 : 0 ]                                       q12                                     ,
 output   logic signed [ 5 : 0 ]                                       q15                                     ,
 output   logic signed [ 11 : 0 ]                                      q16
);
always_comb begin
  q1 = data <<< 1 ;    // logical shift left
  q2 = data >>> 4 ;    // logical shift right
  q3 = ( $signed ( data ) ) <<< 1 ;    // logical shift left signed data
  q4 = ( $signed ( data ) ) >>> 4 ;    // logical shift right signed data
  q5 = 1 >= 0 ? data << 1 : data >> - ( 1 ) ;    // logical shift left
  q6 = 2 >= 0 ? data >> 2 : data << - ( 2 ) ;    // logical shift right
  q7 = - 1 >= 0 ? data << - 1 : data >> - ( - 1 ) ;    // logical shift left negative
  q8 = - 2 >= 0 ? data >> - 2 : data << - ( - 2 ) ;    // logical shift right negative
  q9 = 1 >= 0 ? $signed ( data ) << 1 : $signed ( data ) >> - ( 1 ) ;    // logical shift left
  q10 = 2 >= 0 ? $signed ( data ) >> 2 : $signed ( data ) << - ( 2 ) ;    // logical shift right
  q11 = - 1 >= 0 ? $signed ( data ) << - 1 : $signed ( data ) >> - ( - 1 ) ;    // logical shift left negative
  q12 = - 2 >= 0 ? $signed ( data ) >> - 2 : $signed ( data ) << - ( - 2 ) ;    // logical shift right negative
  q13 = ( data >>> ( amount ) ) | data <<< ( $size ( data ) - ( amount ) ) ;    // rotate right
  q14 = ( data <<< ( amount ) ) | data >>> ( $size ( data ) - ( amount ) ) ;    // rotate left
  q15 = signed'( { data2 , 2'b00 } ) ;
  q16 = ( signed' ( { data2 , 2'b00 } ) ) * 2 ;

end
endmodule // shift_operators3
